texto: Oh, well,” yawned Vernon, “we all know that it’s you Christians who go in for whips and tortures and burnings alive. Poor degraded sensualists like myself believe in the motto ’Live and let live.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Eleanor Scott: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Oh, well,” yawned Vernon, “we all know that it’s you Christians who go in for whips and tortures …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que autoestima, bigotry, christianity pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de christianity.

seo.titleSeo: "Oh, well,” yawned Vernon, “we all know that it’s you…" — Eleanor Scott | Metamensagem
